'''Daushoroc''' was an [[Eirrauc]]. He and another Eirrauc named [[Tamoss]] helped each other escape from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], settling other slaves on a safeworld before striking out on their own.

Sometime during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Daushoroc and Tamoss had become dealers in gems and rare artifacts. They went to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to search for the ''[[Athallian Messenger]]''{{'s}} remains, making a deal with a tribe of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] in order to gain access to the stretch of desert where the ship's remains were said to be hidden.
